blogs.title: Caracal Joins LFX Mentorship
blogs.description: Open source grows when people contribute, learn, and help others build with confidence. Why Caracal is taking part in the Linux Foundation's LFX Mentorship program, and what mentees and the project get out of it.
blogs.author: Caracal Team

vlogs.title: Open Source Friday: Caracal
vlogs.description: A live walkthrough of Caracal on GitHub's Open Source Friday: why agents need an authority plane, how mandates and policy work, and how to get involved as a contributor.

highlights.title: LFX Mentorship 2026
highlights.description: Caracal mentors contributors through the Linux Foundation's LFX Mentorship program.

highlights.title: Microsoft for Startups
highlights.description: Garudex Labs builds Caracal as part of the Microsoft for Startups program.

highlights.title: Weekly Dev Call
highlights.description: Join maintainers and contributors every Thursday at 9pm IST on Discord for roadmap, reviews, and Q&A.
